sections.paragraph:
- Original: Νικόδημος

- Transliteration: Nikodemos

- Phonetic: nik-od'-ay-mos

- Definition: Nicodemus = "conqueror"

1. a member of the Sanhedrin who took the part of Jesus

- Origin: from G3534 and G1218

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Noun Masculine

- Strong's: From G3534 and G1218; victorious among his people; Nicodemus an Israelite: - Nicodemus.
